description: Mexican criminal federation dedicated to drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and other illegal activities. Originally formed as Gente Nueva, the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel, it became independent in 2023 after internal disputes with Los Chapitos. Based in Sonora, it operates in Chihuahua, Sonora, and Sinaloa, and is currently active.

country_links.evidence_quote: El corredor El Paso-Juárez es una ruta lucrativa para los narcotraficantes ya que la DEA estima que alrededor del 70% de la cocaína que ingresa a Estados Unidos fluye por esa zona.
country_links.context: The organization routes drugs through the El Paso-Juárez corridor into the United States.
